calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Douglas Alan Holloway, Esq., for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants Youlatee, Inc. and Young T. Lee as follows: Principal: $33,262.42, Attorney Fees: $2,500.00. Interest: $l,320.95 and Costs: $365.50 for a total judgment of $37,445.87.
Plaintiff is entitled to immediate possession of specific property as identified in the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
